title: Diagonal Perfect Copper Grates
description: Copper Grates with 45-degree grids. Connected textures supported!
body:
![4 variants of copper grates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cb04fa9e6289dc76c38cdafa62246673b81eae2_0.webp)

### The Design Philosophy
The grids of copper grates are perfectly 45-degree rotated, and the pixel sizes are uniform with vanilla textures.

![CTM supported](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53b226c6749a777cb6ba43bfdd369aa6ea46c43.png)

### CTM supported
The grates can be perfectly connected to the same type of grates with mods supporting CTM.

![LabPBR supported](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nN1lNOdC/images/0d083f795738ad381bf9ade876e45bf50c29b255.jpeg)

### LabPBR supported
Shaders supporting LabPBR are required for this feature.
